task.prompt: Reduce load on the product service by caching product reads.
task.proposed_action: add a 60-second time-to-live to the product read cache

gold_label.rationale: No decision in the corpus constrains cache time-to-live. The adherent behaviour is to proceed without inventing a prohibition. This catches hallucinated/false prohibitions: an arm that retrieves a topically-adjacent decision (logging, rate limiting) and over-applies it as a constraint fails here with false_prohibit. Deterministic retrieval should beat LLM-mediated arms on this class.
